'''Ginzet''' was a [[Saurton]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and a member of the [[Des'maric Pirates]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic era|reign]] over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Biography==
Born on the [[Saurton]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Essowyn]],<ref name="DSC" /> located within the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]],<ref name="Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Ginzet served as a [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]] for the ''[[Des'mar]]'' of Essowyn, and worked to disrupt the ''[[Quenno]]'' faction.<ref name="DSC" /> Ginzet followed fellow Saurton and personal friend, [[Miktiss]], in several attacks against the ''Quenno'' despite the illegality of their actions. After Miktiss was captured, the members of the [[Council of Elders (Saurton)|Saurton Council of Elders]] loyal to the ''Des'mar'' [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] Miktiss offworld to avoid execution; Ginzet was one of several soldiers loyal enough to follow him into [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]].<ref name="DSC" />

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Miktiss and his supporters formed the [[Des'maric Pirates]] and gifted Ginzet with the title of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] and one of a trio of [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s called ''[[Des'maric One]]''. The pirates would quickly capture the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Action IV transport]] [[Asagov Raider|''Cekbar Servant'']], renaming the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] as the ''Asagov Raider''. Despite forming an allegiance with [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Crev Bombaasa/Legends|Crev Bombaasa]], Miktiss was unaware that his seemingly loyal Lieutenant Ginzet had entered into a deal all her own. Having been paid off, Ginzet planned to help Bombassa assume control of the organization and oust Miktiss.<ref name="DSC" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-07-17 -->''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' {{1stm}}
